nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Constable was born in 1250, in England, his father, William Constable of Halsham, was 41 and his mother, Cecilia Thweng, was 35. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Katherine de Mauley. He died on 10 April 1294, in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Constable est né en 1250, à Angleterre, son père, William Constable of Halsham, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Thweng, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Katherine de Mauley. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1294, à Flamborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Constable 1250 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Constable of Halsham 41 und seine Mutter Cecilia Thweng 35. Er hatte mit Katherine de Mauley mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. April 1294 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Flamborough, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Constable è nato il nel 1250 nel England, il suo padre, William Constable of Halsham, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia Thweng, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Katherine de Mauley. Morì il 10 aprile 1294, nel Flamborough, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Constable(이)가 1250년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Constable of Halsham(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia Thweng(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Katherine de Mauley(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1294년 4월 10일 영국 요르크실르 플램루에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Constable nasceu em 1250, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William Constable of Halsham, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Thweng, tinha 35 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Katherine de Mauley. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1294, em Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Constable родился в 1250 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени William Constable of Halsham было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Thweng, 35. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Katherine de Mauley. Он умер 10 апреля 1294 г. в местности флэмбороую, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Constable nació en 1250, en Inglaterra, su papá, William Constable of Halsham, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Cecilia Thweng, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Katherine de Mauley. Murió el 10 de abril de 1294, en Flamborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
